subcodes.first_line: O peoples of earth and heaven! Hearken unto My call and judge with fairness in My Cause, and be not among the transgressors. That which was established hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الارض و السماء اسمعوا ندائی ثم انصفوا فی امری و لا تکونوا من المعتدین قد ظهر ما ثبت به
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @free will and predestination; fate, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
